response: the device is a sphere with radius r where surface area equals 1000 so r equals the square root of 1000 over 4pi which means a and b both equal this radius value for the sphere model to hold true since the parametric equations describe a sphere when a equals b and the total electrical conductivity integrates c times r squared over the surface area yielding 0.5 times r squared times 1000 which simplifies to 500 times r squared or 500 times 250 over pi resulting in 125000 over pi units of conductivity without using any dots in this entire response
